textByHashes.64c71e6deb1968c9bcf4d890f15750c59af857dd: Come now Effendi, to pass you must tell me a story, one of grand heroics!
textByHashes.da2f55e62e02c132034cf30aa3274e96eb803496: You thought that was a story of heroics?! Come back when you have something worth telling.
textByHashes.33cf36773ccb0ac1eb4b5b481fa5105133d6f02d: Amazing! A story well worth telling! Please Effendi, enter at your leisure.
textByHashes.e36e0fe472ec3d22fd5fb511d728ea4a7bb41a16: Of course Effendi! You have proved yourself worthy!
textByHashes.5a54d1f2d102ebf090a9bcbba93057cda48a8293: Me? I am Haris! Owner of the area north of here, it is has great resources, I assure you.
textByHashes.25f717afd351f2b343f48212a19d588bdfe0ca3b: Buy? Oh no no no. Do you see this sword, Effendi?
textByHashes.cb96472fc6560164701fb513fe575a74674e5019: Well then, that is why it is mine! [laugh][laugh].
textByHashes.e97b0f527d04d2048abf072360c1e3070c043da2: Not quite, while gold can get you to many places, I seek stories of heroics, for my land is only for the worthy.
textByHashes.b309cde3ea642341f73aa243aa82a2c2eed9e1a5: I promise you, the monkey I took it from was big! [laugh][laugh]!
textByHashes.215df2405058c17d21f0f9482d537548c551c3bc: Hey! I didn't say you could go in there!
